name: echo-foundation
description: Echo / Ashley V4 clean-room foundation and approval-gated AI development pipeline.

scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm --workspace @echo/api run build && npm --workspace @echo/worker run build
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:workspaces
scripts.test:ci: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:mobile-syntax
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @echo/contracts run build && npm --workspace @echo/database run build && npm --workspace @echo/security-governor run build && npm --workspace @echo/orchestration run build && npm --workspace @echo/memory-core run build
scripts.test:core: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
